Therefore, if they fail to establish a long-term contract and replacement refrigerant strategy now, the margins of air conditioners and refrigerators may be greatly shaken. freorfol> Action: ① Recalculate the projected R32/R454B usage for 2026-2027 based on Gwangju, SEHC, and TSE, and reorganize the sourcing structure around long-term contract options with a price upper limit of at least one year. ② Compare the price increase, investment, and regulatory response plans of major refrigerant suppliers to reduce the proportion of high-risk companies, and promote negotiations with stable companies to exchange volume incentives and long-term volumes. ③ Establish a roadmap for expanding models applying low-GWP alternative refrigerants (e.g., R290) other than R32 and R454B with DA and R&D, and establish a portfolio that can respond to the additional strengthening of F-gas after 2027. (Priority: High, Deadline: 2026-03-31) Reference: FRIOFLOR+1, Kirby+1, Freor+1, Homepros+1, Kele+1
lastMonth.Tag_en: Refrigerant, R32, R454B, +20%, regulation, supply shortage, hedging

lastMonth.Title: 미국 10% 관세부과
lastMonth.Summary: 미국 대법원이 기반 관세를 제동 건 이후, 행정부가 모든 국가에서 미국으로 들어오는 상품에 대해 122 근거의 글로벌 10% 수입관세(서차지)를 새로 적용하고 있어요. 이 10% 일괄 관세는 미국으로 들어가는 생활가전 완제품·부품 가격에 바로 얹히는 구조라, 북미향 생산·수출 물량의 관세 부담이 최대 +10%까지 튀어오를 수 있는 매우 큰 리스크예요. DA 기준으로는 상품별 기존 MFN/FTA 관세 위에 10%가 추가되기 때문에, 미국 수입 원가(부품·완제품)가 평균 3~5% 이상 올라가는 시나리오를 C유형 추정으로 보고 있어요. 삼성 관점에서는 SEUS/멕시코 법인에서 미국으로 들여오는 철강·구리·플라스틱 부품, 완제품 세탁기·냉장고 등의 HS 코드가 실제로 10% 서차지 대상에 포함되는지 즉시 매핑하고, 북미향 원가와 판매가격 재산정이 필요해요. 액션: ① 미국 관세청·USTR 공지 기준으로 DA 관련 HS 코드(가전 완제품·부품) 대상 여부 확인 ② 대상 품목에 대해 기준·CIF 기준 원가에 10% 관세 시 총원가 상승률(품목별 3~5% 가정) 시뮬레이션 ③ 북미 주요 협력사·리셀러와 가격 전가 전략 및 물량 조정 협의안 준비 (우선순위: 상, 기한: 2026-03-20)
lastMonth.Title_en: 10% tariff imposed by the United States
lastMonth.Summary_en: After the U.S. Supreme Court struck down the IEEPA-based tariff, the administration is newly imposing a global 10% import tariff (surcharge) based on Section 122 on goods entering the U.S. from all countries. jdsupra+1 This 10% blanket tariff is structured to be directly added to the price of finished home appliance products and parts entering the U.S., so there is a very big risk that the tariff burden on production and exports to North America could jump up to +10%. Since the 10% is added on top of the existing MFN/FTA tariffs for each product based on the DA, a scenario in which the U.S. import cost (parts and finished products) increases by an average of 3-5% is considered a Type C estimate. nytimes​ From Samsung's perspective, it is necessary to immediately map whether the HS codes of steel, copper, and plastic parts, finished washing machines, and refrigerators imported into the U.S. by SEUS/Mexico corporations are actually subject to the 10% surcharge, and to compare the cost and selling price to North America. A reassessment is required. Actions: ① Confirm whether DA-related HS codes (home appliance finished products and parts) are subject to the US Customs Service and USTR notice. ② Simulate the total cost increase rate (assuming 3-5% per item) in the event of a 10% tariff on the FOB and CIF cost for the affected items. ③ Prepare a price pass-through strategy and volume adjustment agreement with major North American partners and resellers. (Priority: High, Deadline: 2026-03-20). References: JDSupra+1, NYTimes+1, MetroGlobal+1
lastMonth.Tag_en: US, tariffs, global, +10%, import costs, trade, North America

lastMonth.Title: 알루미늄 +2.6% 급등
lastMonth.Summary: 어제 알루미늄 3,277.5달러/톤 수준으로 전일 대비 +2.6% 급등했고, 현금결제 가격도 3,226달러/톤 근처라 재고는 줄고 프리미엄은 커지는 그림이에요. 중동 지정학 리스크로 걸프 지역 제련소들이 한 달 치 생산을 멈출 수 있다는 뉴스와, 미국의 50% 관세 이후 미드웨스트 프리미엄이 대비 60%대까지 치솟았다는 보도가 겹치면서 단기 공급·가격 불안이 커진 상태예요. 이런 구간에서는 SEDAM·SCGE·SEPM이 알루미늄 단가 인하를 기대하기보다는, 최소 1분기 이상 공급 안정성과 가격 상한을 동시에 걸어두는 쪽으로 전략을 가져가는 게 현실적이에요. 액션: ① 알루미늄 Q2 선물·옵션 활용해 평균 매입단가 상단 캡 설정(현재가 기준 +5% 이내, 기한 2026-03-12) ② SEDAM·SCGE 주요 압출·코일 협력사와 ‘프리미엄 상한+공급보장’ 패키지 네고(우선순위: 상, 기한: 2026-03-20) ③ 도어·내부 패널 등에서 알루미늄→강판·레진 대체 가능 부품 리스트업 후 2H 양산 전환 타당성 검토 (우선순위: 중, 기한: 2026-04-15)
lastMonth.Summary_en: Yesterday, aluminum prices soared 2.6% from the previous day to $3,277.50/tonne, and the LME cash-settlement price is around $3,226/tonne, showing a picture of declining inventories and rising premiums. Short-term supply and price instability are growing, fueled by news that Gulf smelters may halt production for a month due to Middle East geopolitical risks and reports that the Midwest premium has soared to 60% of the LME premium following the US's 50% tariff. <mark>In this section, rather than expecting a reduction in the unit price of aluminum, it is more realistic for SEDAM, SCGE, and SEPM to pursue a strategy of simultaneously securing supply stability and a price cap for at least one quarter.</mark> Actions: ① Set an upper cap on the average purchase price using aluminum Q2 futures and options (within +5% of the current price, deadline: 2026-03-12) ② Negotiate a ‘premium cap + supply guarantee’ package with SEDAM and SCGE’s major extrusion and coil partners (priority: high, deadline: 2026-03-20) ③ List parts that can replace aluminum → steel plate and resin, such as doors and interior panels, and examine the feasibility of switching to mass production in 2H (priority: medium, deadline: 2026-04-15). Reference: TradingEconomics+1, Reuters+1, ArabNews+1 tradingeconomics+2
lastMonth.Tag_en: Aluminum, +2.6%, supply disruptions, Middle East, tariffs, premium
